[[File:Morrigan's throwing axe detail.png|left|150px]]
'''Morrigan's throwing axe''' is a ranged throwing weapon requiring 78 [[Ranged]] to wield. It is part of [[Morrigan's equipment]], a set of [[Ancient Warriors' equipment]].

On permanent [[Deadman Mode]] worlds, it is dropped by any monster found in the [[Wilderness]] as part of a [[Deadman Mode#Global loot table|global loot table]], the chance being relative to the combat level of the monster. They can also be obtained from looting [[Deadman's chest (scenery)|Deadman's chests]] and as a drop from [[breach monster]]s in [[Deadman: Annihilation]].

The axes are compatible with [[Ava's device]]s, allowing a percentage of them to be recovered on use.

==Special attack==
[[File:Hamstring.gif|thumb|260px|A player performing Morrigan's throwing axe's special attack.]]
Morrigan's throwing axe has a [[special attack]], ''Hamstring'', that consumes 25% of the player's [[special attack energy]] and deals between 20% and 120% of the user's max hit. if the hit lands, it will also reduce the attack interval of the next attack by 1 tick.

Against players, it will also increase the rate in which the target's [[run energy]] is drained by sixfold. When this occurs, the target will receive a message in their chatbox stating {{mes|You've been hamstrung! For the next minute, your run energy will drain 6x faster.}}
